title: Graham Hancock: The Pyramids Are Ascension Portals
summary: This interview excerpt discusses ancient traditions about a global flood that destroyed a former civilization, secret societies preserving knowledge from 'the first time,' and advanced astronomical knowledge connected to concepts of the afterlife and the Milky Way.

key_claims.claim: There are up to 200 traditions of a global flood that destroys a former civilization
One flood tradition is among the only ones that gives a specific date
Secret societies were entrusted with preserving information from 'the first time' and passing it to future generations
Ancient traditions represent advanced astronomical knowledge at a cosmic scale that we don't have today
Ancient afterlife concepts involve a journey through an 'underworld' that is paradoxically also located in the sky/Milky Way
